allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\SimHub\\SimHub.Plugins.dll"\); $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\($bytes\); $type = $asm.GetType\("SimHub.Plugins.PluginManager"\); $methods = $type.GetMethods\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @\("GetPlugin","GetPlugins","GetPluginInterface","GetPluginsInterface"\) -and $_.IsGenericMethodDefinition }; foreach \($m in $methods\) { $args = $m.GetGenericArguments\(\); foreach \($arg in $args\) { $constraints = $arg.GetGenericParameterConstraints\(\) | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; Write-Host "$\($m.Name\)<$\($arg.Name\)> constraints: $\($constraints -join ', '\)" } })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\SimHub\\SimHub.Plugins.dll"\); $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\($bytes\); $iplugin = $asm.GetType\("SimHub.Plugins.IPlugin"\); Write-Host "Looking for IPlugin implementors in SimHub.Plugins.dll..."; $asm.GetTypes\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null -and $iplugin.IsAssignableFrom\($_\) -and $_.IsPublic } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)

PowerShell($sd = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("D:\\SimHub\\SerialDash.dll"\); $iplugin_asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("D:\\SimHub\\SimHub.Plugins.dll"\); $iplugin = $iplugin_asm.GetType\("SimHub.Plugins.IPlugin"\); Write-Host "IPlugin implementors in SerialDash.dll:"; try { $sd.GetTypes\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null -and $iplugin.IsAssignableFrom\($_\) } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName } catch { Write-Host "ReflectionTypeLoadException - some types failed to load"; $_.Exception.LoaderExceptions | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.Message } })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\SimHub\\SimHub.Plugins.dll"\); $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\($bytes\); try { $types = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch { $types = $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } }; $types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null -and \($_.FullName -match "Arduino|Serial|Multiple"\) -and $_.IsPublic } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\SimHub\\SimHub.Plugins.dll"\); $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\($bytes\); $pm = $asm.GetType\("SimHub.Plugins.PluginManager"\); Write-Host "PluginManager properties \(public + non-public\):"; $pm.GetProperties\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::NonPublic -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance\) | Select-Object Name, PropertyType | Sort-Object Name | Format-Table; Write-Host "PluginManager fields \(private\):"; $pm.GetFields\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::NonPublic -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance\) | Where-Object { $_.FieldType.FullName -match "Serial|Arduino|Multiple" } | Select-Object Name, FieldType)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\SimHub\\SimHub.Plugins.dll"\); $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\($bytes\); $pm = $asm.GetType\("SimHub.Plugins.PluginManager"\); $allMethods = $pm.GetMethods\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::NonPublic -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance\) | Where-Object { !$_.IsSpecialName -and \($_.Name -match "Serial|Arduino|Multi|Resolve|Service|Locator|Get"\) }; $allMethods | ForEach-Object { $args = $_.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.ParameterType.Name\) $\($_.Name\)" }; $generic = if \($_.IsGenericMethod\) { "<" + \(\($_.GetGenericArguments\(\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }\) -join ','\) + ">" } else { "" }; Write-Host "$\($_.Name\)$generic\($\($args -join ', '\)\)" } | Sort-Object -Unique)

PowerShell($serialDash = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("D:\\SimHub\\SerialDash.dll"\); $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\SimHub\\SimHub.Plugins.dll"\); $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\($bytes\); $pm = $asm.GetType\("SimHub.Plugins.PluginManager"\); Write-Host "Private fields with SerialDash types:"; $pm.GetFields\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::NonPublic -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Static\) | Where-Object { $_.FieldType.FullName -match "Serial|Arduino|Multiple" } | Select-Object Name, @{N="Type";E={$_.FieldType.FullName}}, IsStatic | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\SimHub\\SimHub.Plugins.dll"\); $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\($bytes\); $delegate = $asm.GetType\("SimHub.Plugins.PluginManager+DebugMessageArrivedDelegate"\); if \(!$delegate\) { $delegate = $asm.GetType\("SimHub.Plugins.PluginManager+ArduinoMessageDelegate"\); } if \(!$delegate\) { $asm.GetTypes\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null -and $_.Name -match "Delegate|Arduino|Message" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object } else { $invoke = $delegate.GetMethod\("Invoke"\); $params = $invoke.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.ParameterType.FullName\) $\($_.Name\)" }; Write-Host "Delegate: $\($delegate.FullName\)"; Write-Host "Signature: \($\($params -join ', '\)\) -> $\($invoke.ReturnType.FullName\)" })
